intent: Sole sweep fixture for 1s_1br_nw_front_back_split_bath_gr -- 8x10 m lot, 24.0 m2 buildable floor, matching this topology's canonical scale. Deliberately restricted to this one compact point (2026-07-20): larger sizes (med/max) are now served by the sibling LDK topology 1s_1br_nw_front_back_split_bath_ld instead (full-width living room + separate dining/kitchen), rather than stretching this counter-divider great_room version past its compact scale.
